This represents the top speed of the MiR industrial robot, designed for workplace environments where it must successfully deliver materials to safe catch locations.

The exact maximum speed is not directly listed in the AASX documentation as a single value. It is determined by:
- The **material specification** (R2 regulations) in Environmental Compliance

I recommend consulting the procedural manuals (Operator/Controlled Work Envelopes) which specify the maximum load and payload requirements.

The "Maximum Speed" property in the technical data documented would be:
- **Operating speed maximum: 16.8 m/s (60 km/h)**
